choices: 8 (detail)
6 Restricted and Forbidden ZonesSLATEFALL_DOSSIER

5 Operational Territory
The asset's authorized operational territory spans approximately 6

8 million km², encompassing the
western and southern Andean states:
Chile — full territory, including offshore islands except Easter Island (restricted)
Bolivia — full territory
Peru — full territory south of 10°S latitude
Argentina — provinces of Mendoza, Salta, Jujuy, Neuquén, Río Negro, and Chubut
Ecuador — limited to provinces of Azuay, Cañar, and Loja
Paraguay — observer territory; no engagements authorized
Beyond this territory, the asset operates only under Director-General authorization
